rewritten_requirements: The system shall keep the troll in a calm state with no actions if there is no detected threat.
The system shall determine the troll's reaction based on the perceived strength of the detected opponent.
The system shall make the troll aggressive and start an attack if the opponent appears weak enough to defeat.
The system shall continue the troll's fight while it can see the opponent.
The system shall calm the troll and return it to a normal state if it loses sight of the opponent.
The system shall make the troll scared and panic if the opponent appears too strong.
The system shall calm the troll and return it to a normal state if it gets away from or loses sight of a stronger opponent.
The system shall remove the troll from the game if it takes a fatal hit and its health reaches zero.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The troll remains calm and inactive when there is no threat.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A troll in a game normally stays calm and does nothing when there is no threat around.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the troll detects an opponent, its reaction depends on the perceived strength of the opponent.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: As soon as it notices an opponent, its reaction depends on how strong the opponent appears.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the opponent is weak enough to defeat, the troll becomes aggressive and starts attacking.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the opponent looks weak enough to defeat, the troll becomes aggressive and starts attacking.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The troll continues fighting as long as it can see the opponent.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It continues fighting as long as it can see the opponent.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the troll loses sight of the opponent, it calms down and returns to its normal behavior.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it loses sight of the opponent, it calms down and returns to its normal behavior.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the opponent is too strong, the troll becomes scared and panics instead of fighting.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: On the other hand, if the opponent seems too strong, the troll becomes scared and panics instead of fighting.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The troll eventually calms down and returns to normal behavior after getting away or losing sight of a stronger opponent.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it manages to get away or loses sight of the opponent, it eventually calms down and returns to normal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the troll takes a fatal hit and its health drops to zero, it dies and is removed from the game.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: During any encounter, if the troll takes a fatal hit and its health drops to zero, it dies and is removed from the game.
